title: Ginny and the Birth of Bonney
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Saturn, King Bekori, Bonney, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, would you be willing to take her in?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The church won't be safe anymore....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I understand. We'll make a new home that protects her from all sources of natural light.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I did it!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: BONNEY...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be back as soon as I can, so be a good girl till then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You look just like MA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're leaving? But I'll be so lonely...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There he is!! Be good marines and shoot him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's the tyrant who usurped my throne!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The very definition of a corrupt dictator!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kill him this instant!!

dialogue.speaker: King Bekori
dialogue.text: I'm sorbet's rightful ruler!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you no shame?! How dare you show your face here again?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Of course...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: ...Kuma SUNK THE ENTIRE ARMADA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: After that, Kuma...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...would go to sea and be branded a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His strength fueled his notoriety, which spread like wildfire, earning him a bounty.

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Daddy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I miss you so much...

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, Bonney-chan, but try to understand...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Kuma-San Saved Us All, He's A Hero!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care!! He was my dad first!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll finally be cured after I turn 10...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...then I'm gonna be a pirate too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well, let's just wait and see...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could be an adult right now if I wanted!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you ever encountered a disease like that before?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She can't be in the sun? How awful...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Found you!! Bartho- LOMEW Kuma, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's a big prize on your head!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Your daughter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...has another 5 years at best...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It'll be a miracle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...if she reaches her 10th birthday.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Heee Eey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's him! o

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Kuma-Chan! <3

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
